recommendations.title: Werckmeister Harmonies
recommendations.overview: A naive young man witnesses an escalation of violence in his small hometown following the arrival of a mysterious circus attraction.

recommendations.title: The Turin Horse
recommendations.overview: A monumental windstorm and an abused horse's refusal to work or eat signal the beginning of the end for a poor farmer and his daughter.

recommendations.title: The Man from London
recommendations.overview: A switchman at a seaside railway witnesses a murder but does not report it after he finds a suitcase full of money at the scene of the crime.

recommendations.title: Satantango
recommendations.overview: Inhabitants of a small village in Hungary deal with the effects of the fall of Communism. The town's source of revenue, a factory, has closed, and the locals, who include a doctor and three couples, await a cash payment offered in the wake of the shu

recommendations.title: Weathering with You
recommendations.overview: The summer of his high school freshman year, Hodaka runs away from his remote island home to Tokyo, and quickly finds himself pushed to his financial and personal limits. The weather is unusually gloomy and rainy every day, as if taking its cue from

recommendations.title: The Garden of Words
recommendations.overview: Takao, who is training to become a shoemaker, skipped school and is sketching shoes in a Japanese-style garden. He meets a mysterious woman, Yukino, who is older than him. Then, without arranging the times, the two start to see each other again and a

recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: STRAW
recommendations.overview: What will be her last straw? A devastatingly bad day pushes a hardworking single mother to the breaking point — and into a shocking act of desperation.

recommendations.title: The Next Three Days

recommendations.title: Be With You
